featureName: Unify Document Preview & Download across all roles
description: Currently gestionnaire uses an in-app DocumentPreviewModal for preview while locataire/prestataire use window.open (new tab). Download handlers are duplicated across 3 files with identical logic. Create a single shared hook useDocumentActions that provides view/download via API routes + manages the preview modal state, then use it in all 3 role views.

userStories.title: Create shared useDocumentActions hook
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a single hook that provides handleViewDocument, handleDownloadDocument, preview modal state, and a renderPreviewModal helper — so all 3 role views use identical logic without duplication.
acceptanceCriteria: Hook exported from components/interventions/shared/hooks/use-document-actions.ts
handleViewDocument calls /api/view-intervention-document and opens DocumentPreviewModal
handleDownloadDocument calls /api/download-intervention-document and triggers file download
Hook manages previewDocument state + isPreviewModalOpen state internally
Hook exports a PreviewModal component ready to render (no wiring needed by consumer)
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Created components/interventions/shared/hooks/use-document-actions.tsx. Hook uses sonner toast (available via root layout SonnerToaster). Returns { handleViewDocument, handleDownloadDocument, previewModal }. previewModal is a ready-to-render ReactNode wrapping DocumentPreviewModal with all state wired.

userStories.title: Refactor gestionnaire to use useDocumentActions
userStories.description: As a gestionnaire, when I click preview/download on a document, it uses the shared hook instead of inline handlers — behavior unchanged (modal preview + download).
acceptanceCriteria: handleViewDocument and handleDownloadDocument removed from intervention-detail-client.tsx
previewDocument/isPreviewModalOpen state removed (managed by hook)
DocumentPreviewModal rendered via hook's PreviewModal component
handleDownloadFromPreview uses hook's handleDownloadDocument
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Removed ~70 lines of inline handlers + state. Replaced DocumentPreviewModal import with useDocumentActions from shared. Also removed unused createBrowserSupabaseClient import.

userStories.title: Refactor locataire to use useDocumentActions with modal preview
userStories.description: As a locataire, when I click the eye icon on a document, it opens an in-app modal preview (instead of a new browser tab) — matching gestionnaire behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: handleViewDocument and handleDownloadDocument removed from intervention-detail-client.tsx
window.open replaced by modal preview via hook
DocumentPreviewModal rendered via hook's PreviewModal component
createBrowserSupabaseClient import already removed
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Removed ~45 lines of inline handlers. Added useDocumentActions hook + {previewModal} in JSX. Locataire now gets modal preview instead of window.open.

userStories.title: Refactor prestataire to use useDocumentActions with modal preview
userStories.description: As a prestataire, when I click the eye icon on a document, it opens an in-app modal preview (instead of a new browser tab) — matching gestionnaire behavior.
acceptanceCriteria: handleViewDocument and handleDownloadDocument removed from intervention-detail-client.tsx
window.open replaced by modal preview via hook
DocumentPreviewModal rendered via hook's PreviewModal component
Lint passes (npm run lint)
userStories.notes: Same pattern as locataire. createBrowserSupabaseClient import kept (still used for quote upload handlers).
